entry.title: A Very Big Video Reasoning Suite

entry.title: OPUS: Towards Efficient and Principled Data Selection in Large Language Model Pre-training in Every Iteration

entry.title: Green-VLA: Staged Vision-Language-Action Model for Generalist Robots
